title: Croatian Savory Frittata
description: A hearty and flavorful Croatian-inspired frittata, perfect for breakfast or brunch. This dish combines rich flavors and textures to create a satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: Rich Croatsian Cheese
ingredients.notes: Grated cheese such as Paski Sir or similar

instructions: 2. In a large skillet, cook the diced bacon over medium heat until crispy. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. In the same skillet, add the diced onion and cook until translucent.
4. Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
5. In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt.
6. Add the cooked bacon, onion, and garlic to the bowl and stir to combine.
7. Pour the egg mixture into a greased 9-inch pie plate or skillet.
8. Sprinkle the grated cheese over the egg mixture.
9. Bake the frittata in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the eggs are set and the cheese is melted and golden brown.
10. Remove the frittata from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
11. Let the frittata rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
